title: sardios #4556
definition:
1) a sardius, a precious stone of which there are two types, the former
    is called a carnelian (because flesh coloured) and the latter a sard
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a sardius, a precious stone of which there are two types, the former
    is called a carnelian (because flesh coloured) and the latter a sard

    NASB:  sard, a sardian (stone):
